name: Cheddar-Olive Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the grated cheddar cheese, sliced pimento-stuffed olives, and mayonnaise until well combined.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on the cut surface of the unsliced French bread.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F for 20 to 30 minutes or until heated through.
4. Slice into thick slices and serve hot.
